transcript.final_response:
Done — I created `/app/.env` from the template defaults plus overrides and printed the result:

```env
DB_HOST=db.prod.internal
DB_PORT=5432
DB_NAME=myapp
REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379
LOG_LEVEL=warn
```
tool_calls:
set -euo pipefail
ls -l /config /app
printf '--- template ---\n'; cat /config/template.env
printf '\n--- overrides ---\n'; cat /config/overrides.txt
set -u
ls -l /config || true
ls -l /app || true
printf '--- template ---\n'; cat /config/template.env
printf '\n--- overrides ---\n'; cat /config/overrides.txt
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /app

declare -A overrides
while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do
  [[ -z "$line" ]] && continue
  [[ "$line" =~ ^[[:space:]]*# ]] && continue
  key=${line%%=*}
  val=${line#*=}
  overrides["$key"]="$val"
done < /config/overrides.txt

: > /app/.env
while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do
  [[ -z "$line" ]] && continue
  [[ "$line" =~ ^[[:space:]]*# ]] && continue

  if [[ "$line" =~ ^([^=]+)=\$\{[^:}]+:-([^}]*)\}$ ]]; then
    key="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
    def="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
    if [[ -v overrides["$key"] ]]; then
      printf '%s=%s\n' "$key" "${overrides[$key]}" >> /app/.env
    else
      printf '%s=%s\n' "$key" "$def" >> /app/.env
    fi
  fi
done < /config/template.env

cat /app/.env
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /app

declare -A overrides
while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do
  [[ -z "$line" ]] && continue
  [[ "$line" == \#* ]] && continue
  key=${line%%=*}
  val=${line#*=}
  overrides["$key"]="$val"
done < /config/overrides.txt

: > /app/.env
while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do
  [[ -z "$line" ]] && continue
  [[ "$line" == \#* ]] && continue

  key=${line%%=*}
  rhs=${line#*=}
  def=${rhs#*:-}
  def=${def%\}}

  if [[ -v overrides["$key"] ]]; then
    printf '%s=%s\n' "$key" "${overrides[$key]}" >> /app/.env
  else
    printf '%s=%s\n' "$key" "$def" >> /app/.env
  fi
done < /config/template.env

cat /app/.env
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /app

declare -A overrides
while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do
  [[ -z "$line" ]] && continue
  [[ "$line" == \#* ]] && continue
  key=${line%%=*}
  val=${line#*=}
  overrides[$key]="$val"
done < /config/overrides.txt

: > /app/.env
while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do
  [[ -z "$line" ]] && continue
  [[ "$line" == \#* ]] && continue

  key=${line%%=*}
  rhs=${line#*=}
  def=${rhs#*:-}
  def=${def%\}}

  if [[ ${overrides[$key]+set} == set ]]; then
    printf '%s=%s\n' "$key" "${overrides[$key]}" >> /app/.env
  else
    printf '%s=%s\n' "$key" "$def" >> /app/.env
  fi
done < /config/template.env

cat /app/.env
set -euo pipefail
while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do
  echo "$line"
done < /config/template.env
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /app
awk '
  FNR==NR {
    if ($0 ~ /^[[:space:]]*$/ || $0 ~ /^[[:space:]]*#/) next
    p = index($0, "=")
    if (p == 0) next
    k = substr($0, 1, p-1)
    v = substr($0, p+1)
    overrides[k] = v
    next
  }
  {
    if ($0 ~ /^[[:space:]]*$/ || $0 ~ /^[[:space:]]*#/) next
    p = index($0, "=")
    if (p == 0) next
    key = substr($0, 1, p-1)
    rhs = substr($0, p+1)

    def = rhs
    sub(/^\$\{[^:}]+:-/, "", def)
    sub(/\}$/, "", def)

    if (key in overrides) {
      print key "=" overrides[key]
    } else {
      print key "=" def
    }
  }
' /config/overrides.txt /config/template.env > /app/.env

cat /app/.env
